texto: Literate, affluent, self-confident people do not like living under either dictatorship or chaos. As more nations move into modernity and find themselves populated with educated, competent citizens, leaders will find it harder to govern those citizens without providing them the democratic rights that they are going to insist on anyway.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Oliver H. Woshinsky: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a lideranca. O trecho “Literate, affluent, self-confident people do not like living under either dictatorship or chaos. …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que lideranca, democracy, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
